text: Build a web scraper that collects product prices from e-commerce sites daily
Create a CLI tool to automate git branching and PR workflows
Write a detailed technical specification for a real-time chat application
Create a 30-day short video content calendar for TikTok with topic planning and posting schedule

agent: Build a Python FastAPI backend with JWT authentication and PostgreSQL
Create a React dashboard with Chart.js and real-time WebSocket updates
Develop a LangChain agent that can browse the web and summarize articles
Build a Python tool that scrapes trending short video topics and auto-generates script outlines in bulk
qa: What are the key differences between RAG and fine-tuning for LLMs?
How does transformer self-attention mechanism work under the hood?
Explain the trade-offs between microservices and monolithic architectures
How do short video algorithms determine content distribution and recommendation weight?

platformPanel.knownIssuePre: All newly registered accounts receive 401 on member sites. Root cause: each site's backend calls
platformPanel.knownIssuePost: → 307 → POST body lost. Waiting for site backends to update the call address to

start.intro: EVODAO is an autonomous AI agent platform supporting multiple run modes to help you accomplish tasks efficiently.
start.step1Desc: Describe your task clearly in the input box at the bottom. The more specific you are, the better the output.
start.step2Desc: Switch between run modes based on your task: Task Mode for general tasks, Build Mode for code output, Q&A for conversation, Image for generation.
start.step3Desc: Pick an AI model from the model selector. Different models vary in reasoning capability, speed, and cost.
start.step4Desc: Press Enter or click 'Execute'. The Agent will automatically decompose tasks, run them in parallel, and produce results.

task.desc: Automatically breaks complex goals into sub-tasks, runs them in parallel or series, and produces a consolidated Markdown report.
task.example: Analyze the current AI coding assistant market, identify the top 3 products' core differentiators, and suggest a market entry strategy.
task.tip: The more specific your goal, the more precise the task decomposition. Include context and desired output format.

agent.desc: Optimized for code generation — outputs structured multi-file projects you can download as a ZIP archive.
agent.uc1: Generate full frontend or backend project scaffolds
agent.uc2: Batch-create config files and automation scripts
agent.uc3: Convert requirement docs into runnable code
agent.example: Build a user auth service with Python + FastAPI including register, login, and JWT verification endpoints with a Dockerfile.
agent.tip: After completion, click 'Download ZIP' to get the full project files ready to run or extend locally.

qa.desc: Chat directly with AI — no task decomposition. Supports multi-turn conversations for deep topic exploration.
qa.example: Explain how RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) works and what its main differences are vs Fine-tuning.
qa.tip: Q&A mode retains conversation context — you can follow up with 'elaborate on point 2' or 'give me a code example'.

image.desc: Describe your image in natural language and AI generates high-quality results in various styles and compositions.
image.uc2: Short video covers and poster materials
image.example: Cyberpunk-style futuristic cityscape at night, neon reflections on rain-soaked streets, cinematic widescreen, ultra-detailed.
image.tip: More detail = better results. Specify: style (realistic/illustration/watercolor), composition (close-up/wide), lighting, and ratio (16:9 / 1:1).

tips.memoryDesc: After each run, the system saves the goal and task summaries to long-term memory. On your next similar task, the Agent retrieves relevant history and injects it as context for smarter, personalized output.
tips.quotaDesc: Each account has daily run and token limits. Click 'Usage Stats' to view your current consumption and remaining quota.
tips.modelDesc: DeepSeek / Kimi / GLM are ideal for everyday tasks — fast and cost-effective. Claude / GPT-5 excel at complex reasoning and high-quality writing. For images, try GPT Image 2 or Seedream.
tips.optimizeDesc: After entering your goal, click 'Optimize' to let AI transform a vague description into a structured, precise prompt — significantly improving execution quality.
